findings.title: DR automation gap
findings.detail: Secondary region fronts static reads but database failover relies on PDF runbook exceeding published RTO.

findings.title: Replication lag unmanaged
findings.detail: Cross-region asynchronous replication exposes replication lag and residency gaps without secondary attestations or compensating approvals.

findings.title: Chaos backlog
findings.detail: No regional evacuation chaos test executed in FY; backlog item cites budget freeze.
